Copied from [http://sliekas.org/basara/gusdocs/doku.php/main:modding_docs:lua:viewport here].

====== Class Viewport ======
<pre>
===== See also: =====
</pre>

[[Lua global#bindings.wormrender|bindings.wormRender]], [[Lua global#bindings.wormrender|bindings.wormRender]], [[Lua global#bindings.viewportrender|bindings.viewportRender]]

===== bitmap =====
<pre>
 bitmap()
</pre>

(Known as get_bitmap before 0.9c)

Returns the HUD [[#bitmap]] of this viewport.

===== from_map =====
(available from version 0.9c)

<pre>
 from_map(x, y)
</pre>

Converts the map coordinates (x, y) to
coordinates relative to the viewport [[#bitmap]] and returns them.

<!-- imported from Wayback Machine: https://web.archive.org/web/20100618083137/http://www.openlierox.net:80/wiki/index.php/Lua:viewport -->
